violations.text: The Sink and Surface concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink and sanitizer buckets was 170 parts per million (ppm) DDBSA. According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the chemical must be 272-700 ppm DDBSA. Chemical was manually mixed during inspection to correct concentration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2023
Chemical for Sink and Surface was not dispensing at proper concentration. Equipment must be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2023
Plumbing at food prep sink and 3 bay leaking. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2023
